popularStory.description:
THE GOODRICH FAMILY

1 February 2018

The Goodrich tribe or family evidently existed in Great Britain at a very early period, but when or what place it first appeared is lost in the obscurity of the p …

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Goodrich於1618年3月22日出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲時，他的父親John Goodrich31歲，母親Margaret "Margerie" Howe29歲。他於1645年與Elizabeth Edwards在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德住了大約4年。他去世於1680年4月6日在美國康乃狄克州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德享年62歲，埋葬在美國康乃狄克州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德維利亞 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Goodrich于1618年3月22日出生在英国英格兰素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲时，他的父亲John Goodrich31岁，母亲Margaret "Margerie" Howe29岁。他于1645年与Elizabeth Edwards在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德住了大约4年。他去世于1680年4月6日在美国康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德享年62岁，埋葬在美国康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德維利亞 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Goodrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Goderiche, Old English Gōdrīc, composed of the elements gōd ‘good’ + rīc ‘power’.
English: habitational name from Goodrich (Herefordshire), a shortened form for ‘castle Goodrich’, which takes its name from Godric Mapson, a holder of the estate recorded in the Domesday Book.
Americanized form of German Güttrich, cognate with 1 above.

variants.name: Goodrick
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lincolnshire): variant of   Goodrich  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Goodrich was born on 22 March 1618, in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Goodrich, was 31 and his mother, Margaret "Margerie" Howe, was 29. He married Elizabeth Edwards in 1645, in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. He lived in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America for about 4 years. He died on 6 April 1680, in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, United States, at the age of 62, and was buried in Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Goodrich est né le 22 mars 1618, à Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Goodrich, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Margaret "Margerie" Howe, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Edwards en 1645, à Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Il a vécu à Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique pendant environ 4 ans. Il est décédé le 6 avril 1680, à Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, États-Unis, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Goodrich am 22. März 1618 in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Goodrich 31 und seine Mutter Margaret "Margerie" Howe 29. Er hat 1645 in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America Elizabeth Edwards geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er hat ungefähr 4 Jahre lang in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America gelebt. Er starb am 6. April 1680 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Goodrich è nato il il 22 marzo 1618 nel Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Goodrich, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Margaret "Margerie" Howe, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Edwards nel 1645, nel Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 3 figlie. Vissuto a Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America per circa 4 anni. Morì il 6 aprile 1680, nel Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England: イギリススフォルクブリー スト エドムンズ
ja.lifeSummary: John Goodrichが1618年3月22日にイギリスイギリススフォルクブリー スト エドムンズで生まれた時，父John Goodrichは31歳，母Margaret "Margerie" Howeは29歳であった。1645年にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドでElizabeth Edwardsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼はイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドに約4年間住んでいた。彼は1680年4月6日にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドで62歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドヴィラッジ セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Co: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드
ko.lifeSummary: John Goodrich(이)가 1618년 3월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Goodrich(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret "Margerie" Howe(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1645년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드에서 Elizabeth Edwards(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드에서 약 4년 동안 살았다. 그는 1680년 4월 6일 미국 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드 비라지 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Goodrich nasceu em 22 de março de 1618, em Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Goodrich, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Margaret "Margerie" Howe, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Edwards em 1645, em Wethersfield, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele viveu em Wethersfield, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America por quase 4 anos. Ele faleceu em 6 de abril de 1680, em Wethersfield, Hartford, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Goodrich родился 22 марта 1618 г. в местности бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Goodrich было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret "Margerie" Howe, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Edwards в 1645 г. в местности ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он жил в местности ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика около 4 лет. Он умер 6 апреля 1680 г. в местности ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности вилладж кеметири, ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Goodrich nació el 22 de marzo de 1618, en Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Goodrich, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Margaret "Margerie" Howe, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Edwards en 1645, en Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 3 hijas. Vivió en Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America durante unos 4 años. Murió el 6 de abril de 1680, en Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Estados Unidos.
